## Type of change

- [ ] `feat` ‚Äî new user-visible feature
- [ ] `fix` ‚Äî bug fix
- [ ] `refactor` ‚Äî no behaviour change
- [ ] `test` ‚Äî tests only
- [ ] `chore` ‚Äî deps, config, tooling
- [ ] `docs` ‚Äî documentation only

## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds (no TypeScript errors)
- [ ] `npm run lint` passes with zero errors
- [ ] All AI output paths go through Zod validation before DB writes
- [ ] No API keys or secrets introduced in client-side code
- [ ] `docs/ROADMAP.md` updated if a milestone item is completed
- [ ] `CLAUDE.md` updated if architectural decisions changed
